name: caibao-pipeline-skill
description: Standalone extraction of caibao's finance-video generation pipeline. Stage 1 parses a video with ffmpeg/ffprobe; stage 2 transcribes audio with Volcengine flash ASR (or a transcript JSON override); stage 3 builds a semantic graph and authors learning-cue payloads via an OpenAI-compatible LLM (or a deterministic mock). Produces a DraftExperience + CoverageReport + timings JSON identical in shape to the caibao web app's HTTP response.
author: caibao team

tools.name: run_pipeline
tools.description: Single-job pipeline runner. Reads --video or --input, runs all three stages, writes --out JSON.

tools.name: run_loop
tools.description: Folder-sweep pipeline runner. Iterates --inputs-dir and writes per-file outputs to --outputs-dir.

tools.name: smoke
tools.description: 8-case offline smoke test. Runs against the demo transcript with --provider mock; must all pass.

tools.name: type_check
tools.description: TypeScript noEmit type check. Must be clean.

modes.network_required: only when provider != mock and OPENAI_API_KEY is set

input: directory of input JSONs via --inputs-dir (loop mode)
io.output: DraftExperience + CoverageReport + timings JSON, shape-compatible with the caibao web app's /api/finance/v1/analysis/jobs/:jobId/draft endpoint
